text:
tooth-i: is the 6th track on disc 2 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 3 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

In Japanese, "tooth" is pronounced "ha", and colons are called "tai". Combined, "ha-i-tai" is a homophone for "haitai" (defeat). 

Musical motifs

The track is a piano and orchestra arrangement of APETITAN (without featuring the verse).

All occurrences

Episode 42 - The military overthrows the royal government
Episode 53 - Erwin's speech

Navigation
